title: Jira official execution-system positioning
claim: Jira positions itself as issue and project tracking software that helps teams track status, stay in sync, and connect work across tools with AI-assisted updates and risks.
source_snippet: The Jira page highlights status tracking, integrations, AI-powered updates, and team coordination across work.
implication: Execution systems already provide status and sync signals, so ProductOS must differentiate on lifecycle explanation and auditability rather than task tracking alone.
followup_questions: What is the minimal trace surface ProductOS needs so PMs do not have to infer discovery history from Jira alone?
